data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding required vs optional request items.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement concerning 'Required vs optional request items'. However, the evidence provided does not include any details about the credential request object or its linkage to the opening for the 'Weekend on-site technician' task. This lack of critical information leads to an inconclusive status as the necessary evidence to confirm or deny the requirement's satisfaction is absent.
gaps: No evidence of a credential request object linked to the source opening/task subject.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
